title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMBoundary
description: Administrative and other boundaries from OpenStreetMap tagged with boundary=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMBoundary

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

boundaryType.description: Property. The OSM boundary tag classifying the border. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:boundary'

adminLevel.description: Property. Hierarchical level of the administrative boundary. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:admin_level'

postalCode.description: Property. Postal code for this area boundary. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:postal_code'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
